expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总体尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板材料的厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板材料的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้พื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván trên, dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa isang kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Likod na Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကယ်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း၏အထပ်၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထပ်ဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ទំហំ​ក្តារ​សម្រាប់​ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth]​ គឺ​ជា​ទំហំ​សរុប, [BoardThick] ​ជា​កម្រាស់​សម្ភារៈ​ក្តារ​គҳа, ​ធាង​និង​ចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] ​ជា​កម្រាស់​សម្រទាប់​ក្តារ​ខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະໜາດໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸຂອງຕາຕະລາງຂ້າງເທິງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງສິໆດຽວຂອງປ້າຍຂ້າງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総寸法です。[BoardThick]は上板、下板および側板の材料の厚さで、[BackBoardThick]は背面板の材料の厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height],[Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des panneaux pour un meuble. [Width], [Height],[Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des panneaux supérieurs, inférieurs et latéraux, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau du panneau arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height],[Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height],[Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, निचले और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height],[Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
